---
ID: US-CMP-BE-513
Title: Post URL update contract after archive
Status: Not Started
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
Ticket: CMP-BE-513
Epic: CMP-E5: Claiming, Scheduling, and Posting Execution
---

As a posting owner
I want to add or correct post URL after posting so history remains accurate.
So reporting and audit links stay useful.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] URL can be added/updated in posted state by owner or authorized admin.
- [ ] URL format is validated.
- [ ] Lifecycle state remains posted.
- [ ] URL update logs prior/new values.
- [ ] Unauthorized updates return forbidden error.
